bench_setup.notes: GPIO loopback test. PB8 drives 5 high/low cycles; PB9 reads back each state. On FAIL: error_code bit0=ERR_HIGH (PB8=H → PB9 read L), bit1=ERR_LOW (PB8=L → PB9 read H). detail0 = correct read count (0..10). On PASS detail0 starts at 10 and increments each ms.

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO loopback driver, output push-pull. Wire: PB8 → PB9.
GPIO loopback receiver, input floating. Wire: PB8 → PB9.
